basic_details.job_title: FM University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Shortlisting + Interview / Presentation as per UGC norms
basic_details.short_information: Fakir Mohan University, Balasore, Odisha has published the Advertisement for Recruitment of Faculty Positions (Professor, Associate Professor & Assistant Professor) including backlog vacancies on 02 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 53 regular faculty positions across 21 Post Graduate Departments. Applications are invited from eligible Indian Nationals as per UGC Regulations 2018 (and subsequent amendments) for various teaching posts. Interested candidates can apply online through the official portal from 7th May 2026 to 7th June 2026. The hard copy of the application along with all

qualification.details: Candidates must strictly fulfill the qualifications as per UGC Regulations 2018 (and amendments). | Professor: | Ph.D. degree + 10 research publications + Total Research Score of 120 + Minimum 10 years teaching/research experience (with evidence of guiding Ph.D. scholars). | Associate Professor: | Ph.D. degree + Master’s with 55% marks + 8 years teaching/research experience + 7 publications + Research Score of 75. | Assistant Professor: | Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET / SET / Ph.D. as per UGC norms. | Relaxation: 5% relaxation in marks for SC/ST/PwD candidates.

how_to_apply: Candidates must follow the two-step application process (Online + Hard Copy Submission) carefully. Incomplete applications or applications received after the due date will be summarily rejected.

Register and Fill Online Application Form Visit the official recruitment portal at https://himsrecruitment.odisha.gov.in and register using a valid email ID and mobile number. Fill all the required personal, educational, experience, and research details accurately in the online application form. Candidates must ensure that all information provided matches their original documents.

Upload Scanned Documents Upload clear scanned copies of all essential documents including: Matriculation/SSC certificate (proof of date of birth) Master’s Degree marksheets & certificate Ph.D. Degree & certificates NET/SET/SLET certificate (if applicable) Experience certificates Caste / SEBC / PwD certificate (if claiming reservation) Research publications, API / Research Score details (for Professor & Associate Professor) Recent passport-size photograph and signature. All documents must be in the prescribed format and size as mentioned on the portal.
Matriculation/SSC certificate (proof of date of birth)
Master’s Degree marksheets & certificate
Ph.D. Degree & certificates
NET/SET/SLET certificate (if applicable)
Experience certificates
Caste / SEBC / PwD certificate (if claiming reservation)
Research publications, API / Research Score details (for Professor & Associate Professor)
Recent passport-size photograph and signature. All documents must be in the prescribed format and size as mentioned on the portal.

Pay Application Fee Online Pay the non-refundable application fee through the online payment gateway available on the portal: ₹1000/- for General / SEBC candidates ₹600/- for SC / ST candidates No fee for PwD candidates Keep the payment receipt / transaction ID for future reference.
₹1000/- for General / SEBC candidates
₹600/- for SC / ST candidates
No fee for PwD candidates Keep the payment receipt / transaction ID for future reference.

Submit Online Application and Take Printout After successful payment, review the preview of the application form, make corrections if any, and finally submit it. Download and print the completed online application form. Note down the Application / Registration Number generated by the system.

Prepare and Send Hard Copy of Application Take the printout of the duly filled online application form and attach all self-attested supporting documents in proper serial order. Send the complete set through Speed Post / Registered Post only to: The Registrar, Fakir Mohan University, Vyasa Vihar, Balasore – 756089, Odisha The envelope must be superscribed with “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ________________ (Subject & Post)” along with Advertisement Number.

Last Dates & Important Instructions Last date for submission of Online Application: 7th June 2026 Last date for receipt of Hard Copy with documents: 17th June 2026 (up to 05:00 PM) In-service candidates must route their application through proper channel or submit NOC from their present employer. Candidates are advised to keep a copy of the application and payment receipt for their records. The University will not entertain any request for change of details after final submission.
Last date for submission of Online Application: 7th June 2026

Last date for receipt of Hard Copy with documents: 17th June 2026 (up to 05:00 PM) In-service candidates must route their application through proper channel or submit NOC from their present employer. Candidates are advised to keep a copy of the application and payment receipt for their records. The University will not entertain any request for change of details after final submission.
Apply Online at: https://himsrecruitment.odisha.gov.in
important_instructions: Only online applications followed by hard copy submission will be accepted. Separate applications are required for each post if applying in multiple departments. In-service candidates must apply through proper channel or submit NOC. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The University reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Jurisdiction for any dispute shall be High Court of Odisha.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Fakir Mohan University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 7 June 2026. Candidates must also ensure that the hard copy of the application reaches the university by 17 June 2026 before 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in FM University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 53 faculty vacancies have been announced for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts. These include both regular and backlog vacancies across 21 departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Fakir Mohan University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is conducted in two steps: online submission followed by sending a hard copy. Candidates must complete both steps to ensure their application is considered valid.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree with at least 55% marks along with NET, SET, or a Ph.D. qualification as per UGC norms. Relaxation in marks is provided for reserved category candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What qualifications are required for Professor and Associate Professor posts?
faq.answer: Professor applicants need a Ph.D., 10 publications, and 10 years of experience with a research score of 120. Associate Professors require a Ph.D., 8 years of experience, 7 publications, and a research score of 75.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for FM University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General and SEBC candidates must pay Rs. 1000, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 600. PwD candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Fakir Mohan University Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by interview and/or presentation. The process will be conducted as per UGC regulations and university guidelines.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for FM University Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official recruitment portal, upload required documents, pay the fee, and submit the form. After that, a printed copy with documents must be sent to the university address.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the hard copy of the application be sent?
faq.answer: The hard copy along with all self-attested documents must be sent to The Registrar, Fakir Mohan University, Vyasa Vihar, Balasore – 756089, Odisha via Speed Post or Registered Post.
